component.name: Pome
component.summary: iCloud Drive for your Linux desktop

description.p: Pome brings iCloud Drive to Linux desktops as a quiet folder that stays available in the background.

It mounts iCloud Drive through rclone and keeps your files available in ~/iCloud Drive. After the first launch, Pome starts automatically when you log in so it can reconnect your drive without getting in the way.
When iCloud needs attention, Pome sends a desktop notification with actions to retry the connection or sign in again.

screenshot.caption: iCloud Drive connected and available in Files
